name: Valuation Agent Unit Evaluation
description: Golden dataset for the market valuator specialist. Tests auction comparables and insurance estimates in isolation.

parts.text: Estimate market value for a Monet Water Lilies, oil on canvas, 80x100cm, 1906. Condition: good.

Based on comparable Monet sales at major auction houses, market value is estimated in the range of $10M to $40M depending on condition report and provenance. Insurance value should be set at the upper end of this range.
Estimate market value for an unsigned abstract acrylic, 60x60cm, contemporary, excellent condition.

Without artist attribution, comparable sales data is limited. Estimated market value is $500 to $5000 for similarly sized unsigned contemporary works. Condition is excellent but cannot compensate for lack of attribution.
